auto_approve.mechanism: Factory Droid does not document pre-configured auto-approval for MCP tools

enterprise_management.mechanism: Factory Droid does not document organization-level MCP management

env_var_expansion.mechanism: Factory Droid MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

marketplace.mechanism: Factory Droid does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

oauth_support.mechanism: Factory Droid MCP does not document OAuth 2.0 authentication

resource_referencing.mechanism: Factory Droid does not document MCP resource referencing

tool_filtering.mechanism: Factory Droid does not document per-server MCP tool filtering

transport_types.mechanism: Factory Droid MCP transport types not documented beyond basic MCP support

providerExtensions.name: MCP Manager UI
providerExtensions.summary: Dedicated MCP Manager UI introduced in release 1.10 for connecting and managing MCP servers graphically without manual JSON editing.

providerExtensions.name: Factory as MCP Server
providerExtensions.summary: The Factory CLI can itself run as an MCP server, exposing its capabilities to other tools that speak the MCP client protocol.
